RuleScenario:
Rule Text: If Johnny is running late, he will not buy coffee.


Scenario: Johnny is running late. He stops to buy coffee.
SMTCode:
(declare-const johnny_running_late Bool)
(declare-const buys_coffee Bool)

(assert (=> johnny_running_late (not buys_coffee)))
(assert johnny_running_late)
(assert buys_coffee)

(check-sat)

RuleScenario:
Rule Text: If Johnny is running late, he will not buy coffee.


Scenario: Johnny's breakfast meeting unexpectedly ran long, Johnny does not buy coffee.
SMTCode:
(declare-const johnny_running_late Bool)
(declare-const buying_coffee Bool)

; Asserting the rule that if Johnny is running late, he will not buy coffee
(assert (=> johnny_running_late (not buying_coffee)))

; Asserting the scenario that Johnny's breakfast meeting ran long
(assert (= johnny_running_late true))

; Asserting the scenario that Johnny does not buy coffee
(assert (= buying_coffee false))

(check-sat)

Scenario: Johnny's breakfast meeting unexpectedly ran long, Johnny does not buy coffee.
SMTCode:
(set-logic QF_BV)
(declare-fun johnny-running-late () Bool)
(declare-fun johnny-buys-coffee () Bool)

(assert (=> johnny-running-late (not johnny-buys-coffee)))
(assert johnny-running-late)
(assert (not johnny-buys-coffee))

(check-sat)
